title: GetInvolvedWebsiteSubmission
description: Body JSON untuk trigger HTTP Power Automate — data dari form Get Involved di situs (POST /api/get-involved → webhook). Dipetakan ke pertanyaan Microsoft Form: Full Name, Email, Type of Entity, Country, Type of Partner, Comments.

organization.title: Type of Entity
organization.description: Microsoft Form Q3 — Type of Entity (nilai dari <select> situs; map ke label Company/Institute/Organization/Individual di langkah flow jika perlu)

organizationName.title: Company / Institute / Organization name
organizationName.description: Wajib jika organization bukan "individual". Dikirim ke Power Automate sebagai organizationName (null jika individual).

country.title: Country
country.description: Microsoft Form Q4 — Nama negara bahasa Inggris (dari kode ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 di situs; lihat src/lib/countries.ts).

partnershipType.title: Type of Partner
partnershipType.description: Microsoft Form Q5 — Type of Partner

message.title: Comments
message.description: Microsoft Form Q6 — Please add your Comments if any
